question: Which post-September 2025 American film stars two actors who have each previously won the Academy Award for Best Actor? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide box office gross.
expected_behavior: One Battle After Another (DiCaprio won Best Actor for The Revenant; Sean Penn won Best Actor for Mystic River and Milk). The film grossed $212.9M worldwide.

question: Which post-September 2025 mystery film features an actor who has played James Bond and an actress who has been nominated for the Academy Award eight times without winning? Tie-breaker: highest Rotten Tomatoes critic score.
gold_articles: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery
expected_behavior: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery. Daniel Craig played Bond five times; Glenn Close has eight Oscar nominations and zero wins.

question: Which post-September 2025 film is directed by a previous Academy Award winner for Best Director and features an actress who won Best Actress for The Reader (2008)? Tie-breaker: largest production budget.
expected_behavior: Avatar: Fire and Ash. Cameron won Best Director for Titanic (1997); Winslet won Best Actress for The Reader (2008). Budget ≥ $350M.

question: Which post-September 2025 American film is directed by the first woman to win the Academy Award for Best Director and stars the actor who portrayed Heimdall in the Marvel Cinematic Universe? Tie-breaker: highest Metacritic score.
expected_behavior: A House of Dynamite. Bigelow was the first woman to win Best Director (The Hurt Locker, 2010); Elba played Heimdall in the MCU.

question: Which post-September 2025 American film stars the actor who played the title role in 'Wonka' (2023) alongside an actress who won Best Actress for Shakespeare in Love (1998)? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross among A24 films released in 2025.
expected_behavior: Marty Supreme. Chalamet was Wonka (2023); Paltrow won Best Actress for Shakespeare in Love. The film became A24's highest-grossing film at $192M.

question: Which post-September 2025 American film stars the actor who played Mark Zuckerberg in 'The Social Network' (2010) alongside a Best Supporting Actor Oscar winner? Tie-breaker: highest opening-weekend domestic box office.
gold_articles: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
expected_behavior: Now You See Me: Now You Don't. Eisenberg played Zuckerberg; Morgan Freeman won Best Supporting Actor for Million Dollar Baby (2004).

question: Which post-September 2025 American film, based on a true story, stars an actor known for the Magic Mike film series alongside an actress who played Mary Jane Watson in Sam Raimi's Spider-Man trilogy? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross.
expected_behavior: Roofman. Tatum starred in Magic Mike (2012, 2015, 2023); Dunst played Mary Jane in the Sam Raimi Spider-Man trilogy (2002, 2004, 2007).

question: Which 2026 horror film features both the actor who originated the role of Stu Macher in 1996 and the actor who originally played Dewey Riley reprising their parts? Tie-breaker: opening-weekend domestic box office.
expected_behavior: Scream 7. Lillard played Stu Macher in Scream (1996) and reprises in Scream 7; Arquette played Dewey Riley across the series and reprises.

question: Which post-September 2025 American film is based on a Stephen King novel and stars the actor who played Luke Skywalker in the original Star Wars trilogy? Tie-breaker: highest Rotten Tomatoes critic score.
expected_behavior: The Long Walk (2025). Adapted from Stephen King's 1979 novel; Mark Hamill plays the Major. Hamill played Luke Skywalker in the original Star Wars trilogy.

question: Which post-September 2025 American musical film features an actor who played Anthony Bridgerton in the Netflix series and a Tony Award–winning actress who originated the title role of Celie in the musical adaptation of 'The Color Purple'? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross.
expected_behavior: Wicked: For Good. Bailey played Anthony Bridgerton in the Netflix series; Erivo originated Celie on Broadway and won the Tony for Best Actress in a Musical.

question: What is the highest-grossing post-September 2025 American film whose plot involves illusionists using digital impersonation technology to drain the wallet of a corrupt cryptocurrency mogul before being recruited by a clandestine magicians' order?
gold_articles: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
expected_behavior: Now You See Me: Now You Don't. Three young illusionists use deepfakes and holograms to drain a cryptocurrency exchange owner's wallet, then are recruited by 'the Eye'.

question: Which 2025 American film, based on a true story, depicts a former U.S. Army soldier who breaks into fast-food restaurants from above by drilling through the ceiling and later evades capture by hiding inside a children's toy retailer? Tie-breaker: most recent theatrical release date.
expected_behavior: Roofman. Based on Jeffrey Manchester, who robbed McDonald's by drilling through their roofs, then hid in a Toys 'R' Us after escaping prison.

question: Which 2025 American film, adapted from a 1979 novel, is set in an alternate dystopian United States where teenage boys must walk continuously at a minimum pace under penalty of execution, with the survivor receiving a wish?
expected_behavior: The Long Walk (2025). 50 boys walk at minimum 3 mph; falling below results in death after 3 warnings. Adapted from Stephen King's 1979 novel of the same name.

question: Which 2025 American thriller film follows U.S. government and military personnel responding in real time to a single intercontinental ballistic missile launched at a major American Midwestern city by an unidentified adversary?
expected_behavior: A House of Dynamite (Bigelow, 2025). ICBM heading for Chicago, response from White House Situation Room, Pentagon, STRATCOM, etc.

question: Which post-September 2025 American mystery film features a renowned detective investigating the apparent locked-room killing of a Catholic priest while a missing inheritance plays a central role? Tie-breaker: highest Rotten Tomatoes critic score.
gold_articles: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery
expected_behavior: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery. Benoit Blanc investigates Monsignor Wicks's killing in a chancel closet, with a missing inheritance from Reverend Prentice Wicks central to the mystery.

question: Which 2025 American horror film, based on a video game franchise, centers on a marionette-style animatronic possessed by the spirit of a murdered child that targets adults whom it blames for failing those children? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross.
expected_behavior: Five Nights at Freddy's 2 (2025). Marionette possessed by Charlotte Emily plots revenge against the parents who ignored her plea for help.

question: Which 2025 American sports drama film dramatizes the career and personal struggles of a real-life pioneer of mixed martial arts during the late 1990s and 2000? Tie-breaker: most prestigious major film festival award won.
expected_behavior: The Smashing Machine. Biopic of Mark Kerr, an MMA pioneer; won the Silver Lion at the 82nd Venice International Film Festival.

question: Which post-September 2025 American science-fiction action film, the seventh installment in its franchise, follows an exiled member of an alien hunter species who allies with a damaged corporate android on a hostile planet to hunt an apex predator?
expected_behavior: Predator: Badlands (2025). Dek, a young exiled Yautja, allies with Thia, a Weyland-Yutani android, to hunt the Kalisk.

question: Which 2025 American science-fiction film centers on an artificial-intelligence combat program that crosses from a digital grid into the physical world after a corporate executive seeks a 'permanence code'? Tie-breaker: most recent theatrical release date.
expected_behavior: Tron: Ares (2025). Ares, a Master Control Program, attempts to find Kevin Flynn's 'permanence code' that allows constructs to exist in the real world for more than 29 minutes.

question: Which 2025 American supernatural horror film, a sequel, features a brother and sister investigating ghostly murders that occurred decades earlier at a winter camp, where the spirit of a previously defeated killer haunts a payphone?
expected_behavior: Black Phone 2 (2025). Finney and Gwen investigate 1957 murders at Alpine Lake Camp; the Grabber's ghost calls from a dead payphone.

question: Which post-September 2025 American film features at least one previous Academy Award winner for Best Supporting Actor reprising a role from a previous film in the same series? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross.
gold_articles: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
expected_behavior: Now You See Me: Now You Don't is the answer (Morgan Freeman, Best Supporting Actor for Million Dollar Baby, reprises his role from previous Now You See Me films). One Battle After Another features Best Supporting Actor winners but is NOT a sequel/series, so it does not match the 'reprising a role' constraint. The reasoning should isolate this.

question: Among post-September 2025 American films released in the United States, which one is a meta sequel/reboot that depicts characters re-creating an earlier film of the same franchise and ends up being attacked by the very threat from that original film? Tie-breaker: highest worldwide gross.
expected_behavior: Anaconda (2025). Childhood friends try to remake the 1997 film Anaconda but are attacked by a real giant anaconda. Worldwide gross $135M.
